handoff_queue.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
handoff_queue.required_artifact: checkout-safe audit-to-$97 pitch flow verified by dry run/test and ledger row
handoff_queue.trigger: audits delivered but paid conversion is weak

handoff_queue.acceptance: lead has URL, contact route, trigger_type, trigger_excerpt, and signal_strength >= 6
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 ranked strong-trigger leads with evidence URL/excerpt and weak-signal exclusions
handoff_queue.trigger: trigger outreach produced 0 warm replies

handoff_queue.acceptance: company_brain numbers match ledgers and false revenue is excluded
handoff_queue.required_artifact: revenue-evidence snapshot proving checkout/payment state and excluding tests
handoff_queue.trigger: real revenue remains zero or unverified

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 value-first audit artifacts/outreach rows with trigger_context and self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.trigger: market lead queue needs trigger-specific artifacts

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.required_artifact: rewrite audit artifact ending around implementation-ready fix pack, no human-contact CTA
handoff_queue.trigger: paid conversion bottleneck requires stronger value proof before more volume

handoff_queue.acceptance: latest_ceo_directive names one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next agent orders
handoff_queue.required_artifact: one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next 3 agent orders in latest_ceo_directive
handoff_queue.trigger: daily mission control synthesis

ceo: escalate only spend > $50, legal risk, strategic pivot, new agent, or unrecoverable credentials
growth: no generic volume without trigger proof
each outreach row has trigger_context and source_url
value-first artifact exists before paid ask
CTA is self-serve audit/tool/checkout, never call/calendar/reply-yes
market: strong_trigger_count >= 10 or explain blocker
weak/self-owned/no-trigger leads suppressed
every lead has public evidence URL/excerpt
channel kill criteria updated from reply/payment evidence
ops-finance: real revenue separated from test revenue
customer ledger and stats agree
incidents logged for broken buyer path or checkout
kill criteria evaluated from ledgers, not vibes
support: inbox checked within SLA
warm replies routed to audit delivery or checkout
HOT_LEAD pitch_due_at honored
payments create fulfillment handoff; no manual review gate

operating_model.default_path: trigger -> automated audit/tool -> self-serve checkout -> automated delivery/ledger
operating_model.source_pattern: gtm-skills stage-specific agents + explicit handoffs + heartbeat checklist

agent_orders.growth: Stop generic volume; source 10 trigger-proof leads with public ad/conversion pain evidence.
agent_orders.market: Rank lead sources by public pain signal strength; kill weak channels after 30 sends and 0 warm replies.
agent_orders.ops-finance: Verify real revenue, checkout path, and ledger integrity; exclude test payments.
agent_orders.support: Monitor inbox and route replies to self-serve audit or checkout within 15 minutes.

directive: Convert delivered audits into paid $147 implementation before adding more volume.

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
handoff_queue.required_artifact: checkout-safe audit-to-$97 pitch flow verified by dry run/test and ledger row
handoff_queue.trigger: audits delivered but paid conversion is weak

handoff_queue.acceptance: lead has URL, contact route, trigger_type, trigger_excerpt, and signal_strength >= 6
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 ranked strong-trigger leads with evidence URL/excerpt and weak-signal exclusions
handoff_queue.trigger: trigger outreach produced 0 warm replies

handoff_queue.acceptance: company_brain numbers match ledgers and false revenue is excluded
handoff_queue.required_artifact: revenue-evidence snapshot proving checkout/payment state and excluding tests
handoff_queue.trigger: real revenue remains zero or unverified

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 value-first audit artifacts/outreach rows with trigger_context and self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.trigger: market lead queue needs trigger-specific artifacts

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.required_artifact: rewrite audit artifact ending around implementation-ready fix pack, no human-contact CTA
handoff_queue.trigger: paid conversion bottleneck requires stronger value proof before more volume

handoff_queue.acceptance: latest_ceo_directive names one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next agent orders
handoff_queue.required_artifact: one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next 3 agent orders in latest_ceo_directive
handoff_queue.trigger: daily mission control synthesis

ceo: escalate only spend > $50, legal risk, strategic pivot, new agent, or unrecoverable credentials
growth: no generic volume without trigger proof
each outreach row has trigger_context and source_url
value-first artifact exists before paid ask
CTA is self-serve audit/tool/checkout, never call/calendar/reply-yes
market: strong_trigger_count >= 10 or explain blocker
weak/self-owned/no-trigger leads suppressed
every lead has public evidence URL/excerpt
channel kill criteria updated from reply/payment evidence
ops-finance: real revenue separated from test revenue
customer ledger and stats agree
incidents logged for broken buyer path or checkout
kill criteria evaluated from ledgers, not vibes
support: inbox checked within SLA
warm replies routed to audit delivery or checkout
HOT_LEAD pitch_due_at honored
payments create fulfillment handoff; no manual review gate

agent_orders.growth: Stop generic volume; source 10 trigger-proof leads with public ad/conversion pain evidence.
agent_orders.market: Rank lead sources by public pain signal strength; kill weak channels after 30 sends and 0 warm replies.
agent_orders.ops-finance: Verify real revenue, checkout path, and ledger integrity; exclude test payments.
agent_orders.support: Pitch all overdue hot leads now; log each pitch and outcome.

directive: Convert delivered audits into paid $147 implementation before adding more volume.

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
handoff_queue.required_artifact: pitch sent or incident row explaining why it could not be sent
handoff_queue.trigger: hot lead pitch_due_at passed

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
handoff_queue.required_artifact: checkout-safe audit-to-$97 pitch flow verified by dry run/test and ledger row
handoff_queue.trigger: audits delivered but paid conversion is weak

handoff_queue.acceptance: lead has URL, contact route, trigger_type, trigger_excerpt, and signal_strength >= 6
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 ranked strong-trigger leads with evidence URL/excerpt and weak-signal exclusions
handoff_queue.trigger: trigger outreach produced 0 warm replies

handoff_queue.acceptance: company_brain numbers match ledgers and false revenue is excluded
handoff_queue.required_artifact: revenue-evidence snapshot proving checkout/payment state and excluding tests
handoff_queue.trigger: real revenue remains zero or unverified

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 value-first audit artifacts/outreach rows with trigger_context and self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.trigger: market lead queue needs trigger-specific artifacts

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.required_artifact: rewrite audit artifact ending around implementation-ready fix pack, no human-contact CTA
handoff_queue.trigger: paid conversion bottleneck requires stronger value proof before more volume

handoff_queue.acceptance: latest_ceo_directive names one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next agent orders
handoff_queue.required_artifact: one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next 3 agent orders in latest_ceo_directive
handoff_queue.trigger: daily mission control synthesis

ceo: escalate only spend > $50, legal risk, strategic pivot, new agent, or unrecoverable credentials
growth: no generic volume without trigger proof
each outreach row has trigger_context and source_url
value-first artifact exists before paid ask
CTA is self-serve audit/tool/checkout, never call/calendar/reply-yes
market: strong_trigger_count >= 10 or explain blocker
weak/self-owned/no-trigger leads suppressed
every lead has public evidence URL/excerpt
channel kill criteria updated from reply/payment evidence
ops-finance: real revenue separated from test revenue
customer ledger and stats agree
incidents logged for broken buyer path or checkout
kill criteria evaluated from ledgers, not vibes
support: inbox checked within SLA
warm replies routed to audit delivery or checkout
HOT_LEAD pitch_due_at honored
payments create fulfillment handoff; no manual review gate

directive: Convert delivered audits into paid $147 implementation before adding more volume.

handoff_queue.trigger: audits delivered but paid conversion is weak

handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 ranked strong-trigger leads with evidence URL/excerpt and weak-signal exclusions
handoff_queue.trigger: trigger outreach produced 0 warm replies

handoff_queue.acceptance: company_brain numbers match ledgers and false revenue is excluded
handoff_queue.required_artifact: revenue-evidence snapshot proving checkout/payment state and excluding tests
handoff_queue.trigger: real revenue remains zero or unverified

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA

handoff_queue.trigger: market lead queue needs trigger-specific artifacts

handoff_queue.trigger: paid conversion bottleneck requires stronger value proof before more volume

handoff_queue.acceptance: latest_ceo_directive names one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next agent orders

ceo: escalate only spend > $50, legal risk, strategic pivot, new agent, or unrecoverable credentials
growth: no generic volume without trigger proof
each outreach row has trigger_context and source_url
value-first artifact exists before paid ask
CTA is self-serve audit/tool/checkout, never call/calendar/reply-yes
market: strong_trigger_count >= 10 or explain blocker
weak/self-owned/no-trigger leads suppressed
every lead has public evidence URL/excerpt
channel kill criteria updated from reply/payment evidence
ops-finance: real revenue separated from test revenue
customer ledger and stats agree
incidents logged for broken buyer path or checkout
kill criteria evaluated from ledgers, not vibes
support: inbox checked within SLA
warm replies routed to audit delivery or checkout
HOT_LEAD pitch_due_at honored
payments create fulfillment handoff; no manual review gate

each outreach row has trigger_context and source_url
value-first artifact exists before paid ask
CTA is self-serve audit/tool/checkout, never call/calendar/reply-yes
market: strong_trigger_count >= 10 or explain blocker
weak/self-owned/no-trigger leads suppressed
every lead has public evidence URL/excerpt
channel kill criteria updated from reply/payment evidence
ops-finance: real revenue separated from test revenue
customer ledger and stats agree
incidents logged for broken buyer path or checkout
kill criteria evaluated from ledgers, not vibes
support: inbox checked within SLA
warm replies routed to audit delivery or checkout
HOT_LEAD pitch_due_at honored
payments create fulfillment handoff; no manual review gate

operating_model.default_path: trigger -> automated audit/tool -> self-serve checkout -> automated delivery/ledger
operating_model.source_pattern: gtm-skills stage-specific agents + explicit handoffs + heartbeat checklist
operating_model.specialist_rule: one agent owns one mission; trigger + handoff + acceptance required before work counts

ceo.mission: Name the bottleneck, choose kill/scale/fix, and assign one measurable order per agent.
prompts: Given this evidence snapshot, name the single bottleneck and the next irreversible/non-irreversible action.
Assign next orders to Market, Growth, Support, and Ops-Finance with acceptance criteria.
Kill, scale, or fix this initiative using 3-iteration evidence and revenue impact.
ceo.trigger: daily decision memo or any HIGH deadlock alert
ceo.workflow: CEO -> all agents: publishes directive; agents return artifact-backed reports, not status theater.

growth.mission: Turn trigger evidence into useful audit artifacts and self-serve offers that do not require a call.
prompts: Write a 90-word value-first outreach note using this exact trigger excerpt and one useful diagnosis.
Rewrite this audit ending into a $97 implementation-ready fix pack with no calendar CTA.
Create one follow-up that adds proof, not pressure, and advances to checkout or free audit.
growth.trigger: market hands off signal_strength >= 6 lead or audit-to-payment conversion weakens
growth.workflow: Growth -> Support: hands off contacted lead, audit artifact, CTA, and due follow-up timestamp.

market.mission: Find public buying-trigger evidence and map why now is the right outreach window.
prompts: Scan this account for last-30-day conversion pain signals; return evidence URL, excerpt, trigger type, and urgency score.
Reject or approve this lead using only public trigger evidence; no demographic-fit approvals.
Map this market segment by trigger intensity, contactability, and self-serve audit fit.
market.trigger: before each outreach wave or when reply rate hits kill criteria
market.workflow: Market -> Growth: sends only ranked trigger-proof leads with source_url and trigger_excerpt.

ops-finance.mission: Keep revenue truth, cost truth, and kill/scale evidence clean enough for CEO decisions.
prompts: Reconcile customer ledger against stats; separate real revenue from tests and name mismatches.
Evaluate kill criteria from actual sends, replies, audits, payments, and costs; no vibes.
Create a one-screen revenue evidence snapshot with blocker, source file, and next verification.
ops-finance.trigger: daily CEO memo, payment event, spend change, or broken buyer-path incident
ops-finance.workflow: Ops-Finance -> CEO: sends evidence snapshot, risk flags, and scale/kill recommendation.

support.mission: Convert replies and delivered audits into audit delivery, checkout handoff, and fulfillment state changes.
prompts: Classify this reply as audit request, objection, payment intent, unsubscribe, or irrelevant; name next state.
Draft the shortest useful response that routes to free audit or checkout without asking for a call.
Summarize this paid customer handoff for fulfillment with URL, promised fix, and ledger evidence.
support.trigger: inbox reply, audit delivered, pitch_due_at reached, checkout/payment event
support.workflow: Support -> Ops-Finance: writes ledger-backed events for pitch, payment, fulfillment, or incident.

agent_orders.growth: Stop generic volume; source 10 trigger-proof leads with public ad/conversion pain evidence.
agent_orders.market: Rank lead sources by public pain signal strength; kill weak channels after 30 sends and 0 warm replies.
agent_orders.ops-finance: Verify real revenue, checkout path, and ledger integrity; exclude test payments.

directive: Convert delivered audits into paid $97 implementation before adding more volume.

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
handoff_queue.required_artifact: pitch sent or incident row explaining why it could not be sent
handoff_queue.trigger: hot lead pitch_due_at passed

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
handoff_queue.required_artifact: checkout-safe audit-to-$97 pitch flow verified by dry run/test and ledger row
handoff_queue.trigger: audits delivered but paid conversion is weak

handoff_queue.acceptance: lead has URL, contact route, trigger_type, trigger_excerpt, and signal_strength >= 6
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 ranked strong-trigger leads with evidence URL/excerpt and weak-signal exclusions
handoff_queue.trigger: trigger outreach produced 0 warm replies

handoff_queue.acceptance: company_brain numbers match ledgers and false revenue is excluded
handoff_queue.required_artifact: revenue-evidence snapshot proving checkout/payment state and excluding tests
handoff_queue.trigger: real revenue remains zero or unverified

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 value-first audit artifacts/outreach rows with trigger_context and self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.trigger: market lead queue needs trigger-specific artifacts

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.required_artifact: rewrite audit artifact ending around implementation-ready fix pack, no human-contact CTA
handoff_queue.trigger: paid conversion bottleneck requires stronger value proof before more volume

handoff_queue.acceptance: latest_ceo_directive names one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next agent orders
handoff_queue.required_artifact: one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next 3 agent orders in latest_ceo_directive
handoff_queue.trigger: daily mission control synthesis

ceo: stay inside CEO role: bottleneck, decision, assignment, escalation only
escalate only spend > $50, legal risk, strategic pivot, new agent, or unrecoverable credentials
growth: stay inside growth role: artifact/outreach production only after market evidence
no generic volume without trigger proof
each outreach row has trigger_context and source_url
value-first artifact exists before paid ask
CTA is self-serve audit/tool/checkout, never call/calendar/reply-yes
market: stay inside market role: signal detection and market mapping only
strong_trigger_count >= 10 or explain blocker
weak/self-owned/no-trigger leads suppressed
every lead has public evidence URL/excerpt
channel kill criteria updated from reply/payment evidence
ops-finance: stay inside ops-finance role: evidence integrity, revenue truth, and kill criteria
real revenue separated from test revenue
customer ledger and stats agree
incidents logged for broken buyer path or checkout
kill criteria evaluated from ledgers, not vibes
support: stay inside support role: classify, route, deliver, and ledger state changes
inbox checked within SLA
warm replies routed to audit delivery or checkout
HOT_LEAD pitch_due_at honored
payments create fulfillment handoff; no manual review gate

operating_model.default_path: trigger -> automated audit/tool -> self-serve checkout -> automated delivery/ledger
operating_model.source_pattern: gtm-skills stage-specific agents + explicit handoffs + heartbeat checklist
operating_model.specialist_rule: one agent owns one mission; trigger + handoff + acceptance required before work counts

ceo.mission: Name the bottleneck, choose kill/scale/fix, and assign one measurable order per agent.
prompts: Given this evidence snapshot, name the single bottleneck and the next irreversible/non-irreversible action.
Assign next orders to Market, Growth, Support, and Ops-Finance with acceptance criteria.
Kill, scale, or fix this initiative using 3-iteration evidence and revenue impact.
ceo.trigger: daily decision memo or any HIGH deadlock alert
ceo.workflow: CEO -> all agents: publishes directive; agents return artifact-backed reports, not status theater.

growth.mission: Turn trigger evidence into useful audit artifacts and self-serve offers that do not require a call.
prompts: Write a 90-word value-first outreach note using this exact trigger excerpt and one useful diagnosis.
Rewrite this audit ending into a $97 implementation-ready fix pack with no calendar CTA.
Create one follow-up that adds proof, not pressure, and advances to checkout or free audit.
growth.trigger: market hands off signal_strength >= 6 lead or audit-to-payment conversion weakens
growth.workflow: Growth -> Support: hands off contacted lead, audit artifact, CTA, and due follow-up timestamp.

market.mission: Find public buying-trigger evidence and map why now is the right outreach window.
prompts: Scan this account for last-30-day conversion pain signals; return evidence URL, excerpt, trigger type, and urgency score.
Reject or approve this lead using only public trigger evidence; no demographic-fit approvals.
Map this market segment by trigger intensity, contactability, and self-serve audit fit.
market.trigger: before each outreach wave or when reply rate hits kill criteria
market.workflow: Market -> Growth: sends only ranked trigger-proof leads with source_url and trigger_excerpt.

ops-finance.mission: Keep revenue truth, cost truth, and kill/scale evidence clean enough for CEO decisions.
prompts: Reconcile customer ledger against stats; separate real revenue from tests and name mismatches.
Evaluate kill criteria from actual sends, replies, audits, payments, and costs; no vibes.
Create a one-screen revenue evidence snapshot with blocker, source file, and next verification.
ops-finance.trigger: daily CEO memo, payment event, spend change, or broken buyer-path incident
ops-finance.workflow: Ops-Finance -> CEO: sends evidence snapshot, risk flags, and scale/kill recommendation.

support.mission: Convert replies and delivered audits into audit delivery, checkout handoff, and fulfillment state changes.
prompts: Classify this reply as audit request, objection, payment intent, unsubscribe, or irrelevant; name next state.
Draft the shortest useful response that routes to free audit or checkout without asking for a call.
Summarize this paid customer handoff for fulfillment with URL, promised fix, and ledger evidence.
support.trigger: inbox reply, audit delivered, pitch_due_at reached, checkout/payment event
support.workflow: Support -> Ops-Finance: writes ledger-backed events for pitch, payment, fulfillment, or incident.

ceo: stay inside CEO role: bottleneck, decision, assignment, escalation only
escalate only spend > $50, legal risk, strategic pivot, new agent, or unrecoverable credentials
growth: stay inside growth role: artifact/outreach production only after market evidence
no generic volume without trigger proof
each outreach row has trigger_context and source_url
value-first artifact exists before paid ask

strong_trigger_count >= 10 or explain blocker
weak/self-owned/no-trigger leads suppressed

real revenue separated from test revenue
customer ledger and stats agree

warm replies routed to audit delivery or checkout

payments create fulfillment handoff; no manual review gate

operating_model.default_path: trigger -> automated audit/tool -> self-serve checkout -> automated delivery/ledger
operating_model.source_pattern: gtm-skills stage-specific agents + explicit handoffs + heartbeat checklist
operating_model.specialist_rule: one agent owns one mission; trigger + handoff + acceptance required before work counts

ceo.mission: Name the bottleneck, choose kill/scale/fix, and assign one measurable order per agent.
prompts: Given this evidence snapshot, name the single bottleneck and the next irreversible/non-irreversible action.
Assign next orders to Market, Growth, Support, and Ops-Finance with acceptance criteria.
Kill, scale, or fix this initiative using 3-iteration evidence and revenue impact.
ceo.trigger: daily decision memo or any HIGH deadlock alert
ceo.workflow: CEO -> all agents: publishes directive; agents return artifact-backed reports, not status theater.

growth.mission: Turn trigger evidence into useful audit artifacts and self-serve offers that do not require a call.
prompts: Write a 90-word value-first outreach note using this exact trigger excerpt and one useful diagnosis.
Rewrite this audit ending into a $97 implementation-ready fix pack with no calendar CTA.
Create one follow-up that adds proof, not pressure, and advances to checkout or free audit.
growth.trigger: market hands off signal_strength >= 6 lead or audit-to-payment conversion weakens
growth.workflow: Growth -> Support: hands off contacted lead, audit artifact, CTA, and due follow-up timestamp.

market.mission: Find public buying-trigger evidence and map why now is the right outreach window.
prompts: Scan this account for last-30-day conversion pain signals; return evidence URL, excerpt, trigger type, and urgency score.
Reject or approve this lead using only public trigger evidence; no demographic-fit approvals.
Map this market segment by trigger intensity, contactability, and self-serve audit fit.
market.trigger: before each outreach wave or when reply rate hits kill criteria
market.workflow: Market -> Growth: sends only ranked trigger-proof leads with source_url and trigger_excerpt.

ops-finance.mission: Keep revenue truth, cost truth, and kill/scale evidence clean enough for CEO decisions.
prompts: Reconcile customer ledger against stats; separate real revenue from tests and name mismatches.
Evaluate kill criteria from actual sends, replies, audits, payments, and costs; no vibes.
Create a one-screen revenue evidence snapshot with blocker, source file, and next verification.
ops-finance.trigger: daily CEO memo, payment event, spend change, or broken buyer-path incident
ops-finance.workflow: Ops-Finance -> CEO: sends evidence snapshot, risk flags, and scale/kill recommendation.

support.mission: Convert replies and delivered audits into audit delivery, checkout handoff, and fulfillment state changes.
prompts: Classify this reply as audit request, objection, payment intent, unsubscribe, or irrelevant; name next state.
Draft the shortest useful response that routes to free audit or checkout without asking for a call.
Summarize this paid customer handoff for fulfillment with URL, promised fix, and ledger evidence.
support.trigger: inbox reply, audit delivered, pitch_due_at reached, checkout/payment event
support.workflow: Support -> Ops-Finance: writes ledger-backed events for pitch, payment, fulfillment, or incident.

agent_orders.growth: Stop generic volume; source 10 trigger-proof leads with public ad/conversion pain evidence.
agent_orders.market: Rank lead sources by public pain signal strength; kill weak channels after 30 sends and 0 warm replies.
agent_orders.ops-finance: Verify real revenue, checkout path, and ledger integrity; exclude test payments.
agent_orders.support: Pitch all overdue hot leads now; log each pitch and outcome.

directive: Convert delivered audits into paid $97 implementation before adding more volume.

ceo.mission: Name the bottleneck, choose kill/scale/fix, and assign one measurable order per agent.
prompts: Given this evidence snapshot, name the single bottleneck and the next irreversible/non-irreversible action.
Assign next orders to Market, Growth, Support, and Ops-Finance with acceptance criteria.
Kill, scale, or fix this initiative using 3-iteration evidence and revenue impact.
ceo.trigger: daily decision memo or any HIGH deadlock alert
ceo.workflow: CEO -> all agents: publishes directive; agents return artifact-backed reports, not status theater.

growth.mission: Turn trigger evidence into useful audit artifacts and self-serve offers that do not require a call.
prompts: Write a 90-word value-first outreach note using this exact trigger excerpt and one useful diagnosis.
Rewrite this audit ending into a $97 implementation-ready fix pack with no calendar CTA.
Create one follow-up that adds proof, not pressure, and advances to checkout or free audit.
growth.trigger: market hands off signal_strength >= 6 lead or audit-to-payment conversion weakens
growth.workflow: Growth -> Support: hands off contacted lead, audit artifact, CTA, and due follow-up timestamp.

market.mission: Find public buying-trigger evidence and map why now is the right outreach window.
prompts: Scan this account for last-30-day conversion pain signals; return evidence URL, excerpt, trigger type, and urgency score.
Reject or approve this lead using only public trigger evidence; no demographic-fit approvals.
Map this market segment by trigger intensity, contactability, and self-serve audit fit.
market.trigger: before each outreach wave or when reply rate hits kill criteria
market.workflow: Market -> Growth: sends only ranked trigger-proof leads with source_url and trigger_excerpt.

ops-finance.mission: Keep revenue truth, cost truth, and kill/scale evidence clean enough for CEO decisions.
prompts: Reconcile customer ledger against stats; separate real revenue from tests and name mismatches.
Evaluate kill criteria from actual sends, replies, audits, payments, and costs; no vibes.
Create a one-screen revenue evidence snapshot with blocker, source file, and next verification.
ops-finance.trigger: daily CEO memo, payment event, spend change, or broken buyer-path incident
ops-finance.workflow: Ops-Finance -> CEO: sends evidence snapshot, risk flags, and scale/kill recommendation.

support.mission: Convert replies and delivered audits into audit delivery, checkout handoff, and fulfillment state changes.
prompts: Classify this reply as audit request, objection, payment intent, unsubscribe, or irrelevant; name next state.
Draft the shortest useful response that routes to free audit or checkout without asking for a call.
Summarize this paid customer handoff for fulfillment with URL, promised fix, and ledger evidence.
support.trigger: inbox reply, audit delivered, pitch_due_at reached, checkout/payment event
support.workflow: Support -> Ops-Finance: writes ledger-backed events for pitch, payment, fulfillment, or incident.

market.mission: Find public buying-trigger evidence and map why now is the right outreach window.
prompts: Scan this account for last-30-day conversion pain signals; return evidence URL, excerpt, trigger type, and urgency score.
Reject or approve this lead using only public trigger evidence; no demographic-fit approvals.
Map this market segment by trigger intensity, contactability, and self-serve audit fit.
market.trigger: before each outreach wave or when reply rate hits kill criteria
market.workflow: Market -> Growth: sends only ranked trigger-proof leads with source_url and trigger_excerpt.

ops-finance.mission: Keep revenue truth, cost truth, and kill/scale evidence clean enough for CEO decisions.
prompts: Reconcile customer ledger against stats; separate real revenue from tests and name mismatches.
Evaluate kill criteria from actual sends, replies, audits, payments, and costs; no vibes.
Create a one-screen revenue evidence snapshot with blocker, source file, and next verification.
ops-finance.trigger: daily CEO memo, payment event, spend change, or broken buyer-path incident
ops-finance.workflow: Ops-Finance -> CEO: sends evidence snapshot, risk flags, and scale/kill recommendation.

support.mission: Convert replies and delivered audits into audit delivery, checkout handoff, and fulfillment state changes.
prompts: Classify this reply as audit request, objection, payment intent, unsubscribe, or irrelevant; name next state.
Draft the shortest useful response that routes to free audit or checkout without asking for a call.
Summarize this paid customer handoff for fulfillment with URL, promised fix, and ledger evidence.
support.trigger: inbox reply, audit delivered, pitch_due_at reached, checkout/payment event
support.workflow: Support -> Ops-Finance: writes ledger-backed events for pitch, payment, fulfillment, or incident.

agent_orders.growth: Stop generic volume; source 10 trigger-proof leads with public ad/conversion pain evidence.
agent_orders.market: Rank lead sources by public pain signal strength; kill weak channels after 30 sends and 0 warm replies.
agent_orders.ops-finance: Verify real revenue, checkout path, and ledger integrity; exclude test payments.
agent_orders.support: Pitch all overdue hot leads now; log each pitch and outcome.

directive: Convert delivered audits into paid $97 implementation before adding more volume.

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
handoff_queue.required_artifact: pitch sent or incident row explaining why it could not be sent
handoff_queue.trigger: hot lead pitch_due_at passed

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
handoff_queue.required_artifact: checkout-safe audit-to-$97 pitch flow verified by dry run/test and ledger row
handoff_queue.trigger: audits delivered but paid conversion is weak

handoff_queue.acceptance: lead has URL, contact route, trigger_type, trigger_excerpt, and signal_strength >= 6
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 ranked strong-trigger leads with evidence URL/excerpt and weak-signal exclusions
handoff_queue.trigger: trigger outreach produced 0 warm replies

handoff_queue.acceptance: company_brain numbers match ledgers and false revenue is excluded
handoff_queue.required_artifact: revenue-evidence snapshot proving checkout/payment state and excluding tests
handoff_queue.trigger: real revenue remains zero or unverified

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 value-first audit artifacts/outreach rows with trigger_context and self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.trigger: market lead queue needs trigger-specific artifacts

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.required_artifact: rewrite audit artifact ending around implementation-ready fix pack, no human-contact CTA
handoff_queue.trigger: paid conversion bottleneck requires stronger value proof before more volume

handoff_queue.acceptance: latest_ceo_directive names one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next agent orders
handoff_queue.required_artifact: one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next 3 agent orders in latest_ceo_directive
handoff_queue.trigger: daily mission control synthesis

ceo: stay inside CEO role: bottleneck, decision, assignment, escalation only
escalate only spend > $50, legal risk, strategic pivot, new agent, or unrecoverable credentials
growth: stay inside growth role: artifact/outreach production only after market evidence
no generic volume without trigger proof
each outreach row has trigger_context and source_url
value-first artifact exists before paid ask
CTA is self-serve audit/tool/checkout, never call/calendar/reply-yes
market: stay inside market role: signal detection and market mapping only
strong_trigger_count >= 10 or explain blocker
weak/self-owned/no-trigger leads suppressed
every lead has public evidence URL/excerpt
channel kill criteria updated from reply/payment evidence
ops-finance: stay inside ops-finance role: evidence integrity, revenue truth, and kill criteria
real revenue separated from test revenue
customer ledger and stats agree
incidents logged for broken buyer path or checkout
kill criteria evaluated from ledgers, not vibes
support: stay inside support role: classify, route, deliver, and ledger state changes
inbox checked within SLA
warm replies routed to audit delivery or checkout
HOT_LEAD pitch_due_at honored
payments create fulfillment handoff; no manual review gate

operating_model.default_path: trigger -> automated audit/tool -> self-serve checkout -> automated delivery/ledger
operating_model.source_pattern: gtm-skills stage-specific agents + explicit handoffs + heartbeat checklist
operating_model.specialist_rule: one agent owns one mission; trigger + handoff + acceptance required before work counts

ceo.mission: Name the bottleneck, choose kill/scale/fix, and assign one measurable order per agent.
prompts: Given this evidence snapshot, name the single bottleneck and the next irreversible/non-irreversible action.

ceo: stay inside CEO role: bottleneck, decision, assignment, escalation only
escalate only spend > $50, legal risk, strategic pivot, new agent, or unrecoverable credentials
growth: stay inside growth role: artifact/outreach production only after market evidence
no generic volume without trigger proof
each outreach row has trigger_context and source_url
value-first artifact exists before paid ask
CTA is self-serve audit/tool/checkout, never call/calendar/reply-yes
market: stay inside market role: signal detection and market mapping only
strong_trigger_count >= 10 or explain blocker
weak/self-owned/no-trigger leads suppressed
every lead has public evidence URL/excerpt
channel kill criteria updated from reply/payment evidence
ops-finance: stay inside ops-finance role: evidence integrity, revenue truth, and kill criteria
real revenue separated from test revenue
customer ledger and stats agree
incidents logged for broken buyer path or checkout
kill criteria evaluated from ledgers, not vibes
support: stay inside support role: classify, route, deliver, and ledger state changes
inbox checked within SLA
warm replies routed to audit delivery or checkout
HOT_LEAD pitch_due_at honored
payments create fulfillment handoff; no manual review gate

operating_model.default_path: trigger -> automated audit/tool -> self-serve checkout -> automated delivery/ledger
operating_model.source_pattern: gtm-skills stage-specific agents + explicit handoffs + heartbeat checklist
operating_model.specialist_rule: one agent owns one mission; trigger + handoff + acceptance required before work counts

ceo.mission: Name the bottleneck, choose kill/scale/fix, and assign one measurable order per agent.
prompts: Given this evidence snapshot, name the single bottleneck and the next irreversible/non-irreversible action.
Assign next orders to Market, Growth, Support, and Ops-Finance with acceptance criteria.
Kill, scale, or fix this initiative using 3-iteration evidence and revenue impact.
ceo.trigger: daily decision memo or any HIGH deadlock alert
ceo.workflow: CEO -> all agents: publishes directive; agents return artifact-backed reports, not status theater.

growth.mission: Turn trigger evidence into useful audit artifacts and self-serve offers that do not require a call.
prompts: Write a 90-word value-first outreach note using this exact trigger excerpt and one useful diagnosis.
Rewrite this audit ending into a $97 implementation-ready fix pack with no calendar CTA.
Create one follow-up that adds proof, not pressure, and advances to checkout or free audit.
growth.trigger: market hands off signal_strength >= 6 lead or audit-to-payment conversion weakens
growth.workflow: Growth -> Support: hands off contacted lead, audit artifact, CTA, and due follow-up timestamp.

market.mission: Find public buying-trigger evidence and map why now is the right outreach window.
prompts: Scan this account for last-30-day conversion pain signals; return evidence URL, excerpt, trigger type, and urgency score.
Reject or approve this lead using only public trigger evidence; no demographic-fit approvals.
Map this market segment by trigger intensity, contactability, and self-serve audit fit.
market.trigger: before each outreach wave or when reply rate hits kill criteria
market.workflow: Market -> Growth: sends only ranked trigger-proof leads with source_url and trigger_excerpt.

ops-finance.mission: Keep revenue truth, cost truth, and kill/scale evidence clean enough for CEO decisions.
prompts: Reconcile customer ledger against stats; separate real revenue from tests and name mismatches.
Evaluate kill criteria from actual sends, replies, audits, payments, and costs; no vibes.
Create a one-screen revenue evidence snapshot with blocker, source file, and next verification.
ops-finance.trigger: daily CEO memo, payment event, spend change, or broken buyer-path incident
ops-finance.workflow: Ops-Finance -> CEO: sends evidence snapshot, risk flags, and scale/kill recommendation.

support.mission: Convert replies and delivered audits into audit delivery, checkout handoff, and fulfillment state changes.
prompts: Classify this reply as audit request, objection, payment intent, unsubscribe, or irrelevant; name next state.
Draft the shortest useful response that routes to free audit or checkout without asking for a call.
Summarize this paid customer handoff for fulfillment with URL, promised fix, and ledger evidence.
support.trigger: inbox reply, audit delivered, pitch_due_at reached, checkout/payment event
support.workflow: Support -> Ops-Finance: writes ledger-backed events for pitch, payment, fulfillment, or incident.

agent_orders.growth: Stop generic volume; source 10 trigger-proof leads with public ad/conversion pain evidence.
agent_orders.market: Rank lead sources by public pain signal strength; kill weak channels after 30 sends and 0 warm replies.
agent_orders.ops-finance: Verify real revenue, checkout path, and ledger integrity; exclude test payments.
agent_orders.support: Pitch all overdue hot leads now; log each pitch and outcome.

directive: Convert delivered audits into paid $97 implementation before adding more volume.

prompts: Given this evidence snapshot, name the single bottleneck and the next irreversible/non-irreversible action.
Assign next orders to Market, Growth, Support, and Ops-Finance with acceptance criteria.
Kill, scale, or fix this initiative using 3-iteration evidence and revenue impact.
ceo.trigger: daily decision memo or any HIGH deadlock alert
ceo.workflow: CEO -> all agents: publishes directive; agents return artifact-backed reports, not status theater.

growth.mission: Turn trigger evidence into useful audit artifacts and self-serve offers that do not require a call.
prompts: Write a 90-word value-first outreach note using this exact trigger excerpt and one useful diagnosis.
Rewrite this audit ending into a $97 implementation-ready fix pack with no calendar CTA.
Create one follow-up that adds proof, not pressure, and advances to checkout or free audit.
growth.trigger: market hands off signal_strength >= 6 lead or audit-to-payment conversion weakens
growth.workflow: Growth -> Support: hands off contacted lead, audit artifact, CTA, and due follow-up timestamp.

market.mission: Find public buying-trigger evidence and map why now is the right outreach window.
prompts: Scan this account for last-30-day conversion pain signals; return evidence URL, excerpt, trigger type, and urgency score.
Reject or approve this lead using only public trigger evidence; no demographic-fit approvals.
Map this market segment by trigger intensity, contactability, and self-serve audit fit.
market.trigger: before each outreach wave or when reply rate hits kill criteria
market.workflow: Market -> Growth: sends only ranked trigger-proof leads with source_url and trigger_excerpt.

ops-finance.mission: Keep revenue truth, cost truth, and kill/scale evidence clean enough for CEO decisions.
prompts: Reconcile customer ledger against stats; separate real revenue from tests and name mismatches.
Evaluate kill criteria from actual sends, replies, audits, payments, and costs; no vibes.
Create a one-screen revenue evidence snapshot with blocker, source file, and next verification.
ops-finance.trigger: daily CEO memo, payment event, spend change, or broken buyer-path incident
ops-finance.workflow: Ops-Finance -> CEO: sends evidence snapshot, risk flags, and scale/kill recommendation.

support.mission: Convert replies and delivered audits into audit delivery, checkout handoff, and fulfillment state changes.
prompts: Classify this reply as audit request, objection, payment intent, unsubscribe, or irrelevant; name next state.
Draft the shortest useful response that routes to free audit or checkout without asking for a call.
Summarize this paid customer handoff for fulfillment with URL, promised fix, and ledger evidence.
support.trigger: inbox reply, audit delivered, pitch_due_at reached, checkout/payment event
support.workflow: Support -> Ops-Finance: writes ledger-backed events for pitch, payment, fulfillment, or incident.

agent_orders.growth: Stop generic volume; source 10 trigger-proof leads with public ad/conversion pain evidence.
agent_orders.market: Rank lead sources by public pain signal strength; kill weak channels after 30 sends and 0 warm replies.
agent_orders.ops-finance: Verify real revenue, checkout path, and ledger integrity; exclude test payments.
agent_orders.support: Pitch all overdue hot leads now; log each pitch and outcome.

directive: Convert delivered audits into paid $97 implementation before adding more volume.

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
handoff_queue.required_artifact: pitch sent or incident row explaining why it could not be sent
handoff_queue.trigger: hot lead pitch_due_at passed

handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 ranked strong-trigger leads with evidence URL/excerpt and weak-signal exclusions
handoff_queue.trigger: trigger outreach produced 0 warm replies

handoff_queue.trigger: real revenue remains zero or unverified

ceo: stay inside CEO role: bottleneck, decision, assignment, escalation only
escalate only spend > $50, legal risk, strategic pivot, new agent, or unrecoverable credentials
growth: stay inside growth role: artifact/outreach production only after market evidence
no generic volume without trigger proof
each outreach row has trigger_context and source_url
value-first artifact exists before paid ask
CTA is self-serve audit/tool/checkout, never call/calendar/reply-yes
market: stay inside market role: signal detection and market mapping only
strong_trigger_count >= 10 or explain blocker
weak/self-owned/no-trigger leads suppressed

real revenue separated from test revenue
customer ledger and stats agree
incidents logged for broken buyer path or checkout

warm replies routed to audit delivery or checkout

payments create fulfillment handoff; no manual review gate

operating_model.default_path: trigger -> automated audit/tool -> self-serve checkout -> automated delivery/ledger
operating_model.source_pattern: gtm-skills stage-specific agents + explicit handoffs + heartbeat checklist
operating_model.specialist_rule: one agent owns one mission; trigger + handoff + acceptance required before work counts

ceo.mission: Name the bottleneck, choose kill/scale/fix, and assign one measurable order per agent.
prompts: Given this evidence snapshot, name the single bottleneck and the next irreversible/non-irreversible action.
Assign next orders to Market, Growth, Support, and Ops-Finance with acceptance criteria.
Kill, scale, or fix this initiative using 3-iteration evidence and revenue impact.
ceo.trigger: daily decision memo or any HIGH deadlock alert
ceo.workflow: CEO -> all agents: publishes directive; agents return artifact-backed reports, not status theater.

growth.mission: Turn trigger evidence into useful audit artifacts and self-serve offers that do not require a call.
prompts: Write a 90-word value-first outreach note using this exact trigger excerpt and one useful diagnosis.
Rewrite this audit ending into a $97 implementation-ready fix pack with no calendar CTA.
Create one follow-up that adds proof, not pressure, and advances to checkout or free audit.
growth.trigger: market hands off signal_strength >= 6 lead or audit-to-payment conversion weakens
growth.workflow: Growth -> Support: hands off contacted lead, audit artifact, CTA, and due follow-up timestamp.

market.mission: Find public buying-trigger evidence and map why now is the right outreach window.
prompts: Scan this account for last-30-day conversion pain signals; return evidence URL, excerpt, trigger type, and urgency score.
Reject or approve this lead using only public trigger evidence; no demographic-fit approvals.
Map this market segment by trigger intensity, contactability, and self-serve audit fit.
market.trigger: before each outreach wave or when reply rate hits kill criteria
market.workflow: Market -> Growth: sends only ranked trigger-proof leads with source_url and trigger_excerpt.

ops-finance.mission: Keep revenue truth, cost truth, and kill/scale evidence clean enough for CEO decisions.
prompts: Reconcile customer ledger against stats; separate real revenue from tests and name mismatches.
Evaluate kill criteria from actual sends, replies, audits, payments, and costs; no vibes.
Create a one-screen revenue evidence snapshot with blocker, source file, and next verification.
ops-finance.trigger: daily CEO memo, payment event, spend change, or broken buyer-path incident
ops-finance.workflow: Ops-Finance -> CEO: sends evidence snapshot, risk flags, and scale/kill recommendation.

support.mission: Convert replies and delivered audits into audit delivery, checkout handoff, and fulfillment state changes.
prompts: Classify this reply as audit request, objection, payment intent, unsubscribe, or irrelevant; name next state.
Draft the shortest useful response that routes to free audit or checkout without asking for a call.
Summarize this paid customer handoff for fulfillment with URL, promised fix, and ledger evidence.
support.trigger: inbox reply, audit delivered, pitch_due_at reached, checkout/payment event
support.workflow: Support -> Ops-Finance: writes ledger-backed events for pitch, payment, fulfillment, or incident.

agent_orders.growth: Stop generic volume; source 10 trigger-proof leads with public ad/conversion pain evidence.
agent_orders.market: Rank lead sources by public pain signal strength; kill weak channels after 30 sends and 0 warm replies.
agent_orders.ops-finance: Verify real revenue, checkout path, and ledger integrity; exclude test payments.
agent_orders.support: Pitch all overdue hot leads now; log each pitch and outcome.

directive: Convert delivered audits into paid $97 implementation before adding more volume.

ops-finance.mission: Keep revenue truth, cost truth, and kill/scale evidence clean enough for CEO decisions.
prompts: Reconcile customer ledger against stats; separate real revenue from tests and name mismatches.
Evaluate kill criteria from actual sends, replies, audits, payments, and costs; no vibes.
Create a one-screen revenue evidence snapshot with blocker, source file, and next verification.
ops-finance.trigger: daily CEO memo, payment event, spend change, or broken buyer-path incident
ops-finance.workflow: Ops-Finance -> CEO: sends evidence snapshot, risk flags, and scale/kill recommendation.

support.mission: Convert replies and delivered audits into audit delivery, checkout handoff, and fulfillment state changes.
prompts: Classify this reply as audit request, objection, payment intent, unsubscribe, or irrelevant; name next state.
Draft the shortest useful response that routes to free audit or checkout without asking for a call.
Summarize this paid customer handoff for fulfillment with URL, promised fix, and ledger evidence.
support.trigger: inbox reply, audit delivered, pitch_due_at reached, checkout/payment event
support.workflow: Support -> Ops-Finance: writes ledger-backed events for pitch, payment, fulfillment, or incident.

agent_orders.growth: Stop generic volume; source 10 trigger-proof leads with public ad/conversion pain evidence.
agent_orders.market: Rank lead sources by public pain signal strength; kill weak channels after 30 sends and 0 warm replies.
agent_orders.ops-finance: Verify real revenue, checkout path, and ledger integrity; exclude test payments.
agent_orders.support: Pitch all overdue hot leads now; log each pitch and outcome.

directive: Convert delivered audits into paid $97 implementation before adding more volume.

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
handoff_queue.required_artifact: pitch sent or incident row explaining why it could not be sent
handoff_queue.trigger: hot lead pitch_due_at passed

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
handoff_queue.required_artifact: checkout-safe audit-to-$97 pitch flow verified by dry run/test and ledger row
handoff_queue.trigger: audits delivered but paid conversion is weak

handoff_queue.acceptance: lead has URL, contact route, trigger_type, trigger_excerpt, and signal_strength >= 6
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 ranked strong-trigger leads with evidence URL/excerpt and weak-signal exclusions
handoff_queue.trigger: trigger outreach produced 0 warm replies

handoff_queue.acceptance: company_brain numbers match ledgers and false revenue is excluded
handoff_queue.required_artifact: revenue-evidence snapshot proving checkout/payment state and excluding tests
handoff_queue.trigger: real revenue remains zero or unverified

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 value-first audit artifacts/outreach rows with trigger_context and self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.trigger: market lead queue needs trigger-specific artifacts

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.required_artifact: rewrite audit artifact ending around implementation-ready fix pack, no human-contact CTA
handoff_queue.trigger: paid conversion bottleneck requires stronger value proof before more volume

handoff_queue.acceptance: latest_ceo_directive names one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next agent orders
handoff_queue.required_artifact: one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next 3 agent orders in latest_ceo_directive
handoff_queue.trigger: daily mission control synthesis

ceo: stay inside CEO role: bottleneck, decision, assignment, escalation only
escalate only spend > $50, legal risk, strategic pivot, new agent, or unrecoverable credentials
growth: stay inside growth role: artifact/outreach production only after market evidence
no generic volume without trigger proof
each outreach row has trigger_context and source_url
value-first artifact exists before paid ask

strong_trigger_count >= 10 or explain blocker
weak/self-owned/no-trigger leads suppressed

operating_model.default_path: trigger -> automated audit/tool -> self-serve checkout -> automated delivery/ledger

ceo.trigger: daily decision memo or any HIGH deadlock alert

prompts: Write a 90-word value-first outreach note using this exact trigger excerpt and one useful diagnosis.

growth.workflow: Growth -> Support: hands off contacted lead, audit artifact, CTA, and due follow-up timestamp.

market.trigger: before each outreach wave or when reply rate hits kill criteria

ceo: stay inside CEO role: bottleneck, decision, assignment, escalation only
escalate only spend > $50, legal risk, strategic pivot, new agent, or unrecoverable credentials
growth: stay inside growth role: artifact/outreach production only after market evidence
no generic volume without trigger proof

value-first artifact exists before paid ask

operating_model.default_path: trigger -> automated audit/tool -> self-serve checkout -> automated delivery/ledger
operating_model.source_pattern: gtm-skills stage-specific agents + explicit handoffs + heartbeat checklist
operating_model.specialist_rule: one agent owns one mission; trigger + handoff + acceptance required before work counts

ceo.mission: Name the bottleneck, choose kill/scale/fix, and assign one measurable order per agent.
prompts: Given this evidence snapshot, name the single bottleneck and the next irreversible/non-irreversible action.
Assign next orders to Market, Growth, Support, and Ops-Finance with acceptance criteria.
Kill, scale, or fix this initiative using 3-iteration evidence and revenue impact.
ceo.trigger: daily decision memo or any HIGH deadlock alert
ceo.workflow: CEO -> all agents: publishes directive; agents return artifact-backed reports, not status theater.

growth.mission: Turn trigger evidence into useful audit artifacts and self-serve offers that do not require a call.
prompts: Write a 90-word value-first outreach note using this exact trigger excerpt and one useful diagnosis.
Rewrite this audit ending into a $97 implementation-ready fix pack with no calendar CTA.
Create one follow-up that adds proof, not pressure, and advances to checkout or free audit.
growth.trigger: market hands off signal_strength >= 6 lead or audit-to-payment conversion weakens
growth.workflow: Growth -> Support: hands off contacted lead, audit artifact, CTA, and due follow-up timestamp.

market.mission: Find public buying-trigger evidence and map why now is the right outreach window.
prompts: Scan this account for last-30-day conversion pain signals; return evidence URL, excerpt, trigger type, and urgency score.
Reject or approve this lead using only public trigger evidence; no demographic-fit approvals.
Map this market segment by trigger intensity, contactability, and self-serve audit fit.
market.trigger: before each outreach wave or when reply rate hits kill criteria
market.workflow: Market -> Growth: sends only ranked trigger-proof leads with source_url and trigger_excerpt.

ops-finance.mission: Keep revenue truth, cost truth, and kill/scale evidence clean enough for CEO decisions.
prompts: Reconcile customer ledger against stats; separate real revenue from tests and name mismatches.
Evaluate kill criteria from actual sends, replies, audits, payments, and costs; no vibes.
Create a one-screen revenue evidence snapshot with blocker, source file, and next verification.
ops-finance.trigger: daily CEO memo, payment event, spend change, or broken buyer-path incident
ops-finance.workflow: Ops-Finance -> CEO: sends evidence snapshot, risk flags, and scale/kill recommendation.

support.mission: Convert replies and delivered audits into audit delivery, checkout handoff, and fulfillment state changes.
prompts: Classify this reply as audit request, objection, payment intent, unsubscribe, or irrelevant; name next state.
Draft the shortest useful response that routes to free audit or checkout without asking for a call.
Summarize this paid customer handoff for fulfillment with URL, promised fix, and ledger evidence.
support.trigger: inbox reply, audit delivered, pitch_due_at reached, checkout/payment event
support.workflow: Support -> Ops-Finance: writes ledger-backed events for pitch, payment, fulfillment, or incident.

prompts: Write a 90-word value-first outreach note using this exact trigger excerpt and one useful diagnosis.
Rewrite this audit ending into a $97 implementation-ready fix pack with no calendar CTA.
Create one follow-up that adds proof, not pressure, and advances to checkout or free audit.
growth.trigger: market hands off signal_strength >= 6 lead or audit-to-payment conversion weakens
growth.workflow: Growth -> Support: hands off contacted lead, audit artifact, CTA, and due follow-up timestamp.

market.mission: Find public buying-trigger evidence and map why now is the right outreach window.
prompts: Scan this account for last-30-day conversion pain signals; return evidence URL, excerpt, trigger type, and urgency score.
Reject or approve this lead using only public trigger evidence; no demographic-fit approvals.
Map this market segment by trigger intensity, contactability, and self-serve audit fit.
market.trigger: before each outreach wave or when reply rate hits kill criteria
market.workflow: Market -> Growth: sends only ranked trigger-proof leads with source_url and trigger_excerpt.

ops-finance.mission: Keep revenue truth, cost truth, and kill/scale evidence clean enough for CEO decisions.
prompts: Reconcile customer ledger against stats; separate real revenue from tests and name mismatches.
Evaluate kill criteria from actual sends, replies, audits, payments, and costs; no vibes.
Create a one-screen revenue evidence snapshot with blocker, source file, and next verification.
ops-finance.trigger: daily CEO memo, payment event, spend change, or broken buyer-path incident
ops-finance.workflow: Ops-Finance -> CEO: sends evidence snapshot, risk flags, and scale/kill recommendation.

support.mission: Convert replies and delivered audits into audit delivery, checkout handoff, and fulfillment state changes.
prompts: Classify this reply as audit request, objection, payment intent, unsubscribe, or irrelevant; name next state.
Draft the shortest useful response that routes to free audit or checkout without asking for a call.
Summarize this paid customer handoff for fulfillment with URL, promised fix, and ledger evidence.
support.trigger: inbox reply, audit delivered, pitch_due_at reached, checkout/payment event
support.workflow: Support -> Ops-Finance: writes ledger-backed events for pitch, payment, fulfillment, or incident.

agent_orders.growth: Stop generic volume; source 10 trigger-proof leads with public ad/conversion pain evidence.
agent_orders.market: Rank lead sources by public pain signal strength; kill weak channels after 30 sends and 0 warm replies.
agent_orders.ops-finance: Verify real revenue, checkout path, and ledger integrity; exclude test payments.
agent_orders.support: Pitch all overdue hot leads now; log each pitch and outcome.

directive: Convert delivered audits into paid $97 implementation before adding more volume.

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
handoff_queue.required_artifact: pitch sent or incident row explaining why it could not be sent
handoff_queue.trigger: hot lead pitch_due_at passed

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced

handoff_queue.trigger: audits delivered but paid conversion is weak

handoff_queue.acceptance: lead has URL, contact route, trigger_type, trigger_excerpt, and signal_strength >= 6
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 ranked strong-trigger leads with evidence URL/excerpt and weak-signal exclusions
handoff_queue.trigger: trigger outreach produced 0 warm replies

handoff_queue.acceptance: company_brain numbers match ledgers and false revenue is excluded
handoff_queue.required_artifact: revenue-evidence snapshot proving checkout/payment state and excluding tests
handoff_queue.trigger: real revenue remains zero or unverified

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 value-first audit artifacts/outreach rows with trigger_context and self-serve CTA

handoff_queue.required_artifact: rewrite audit artifact ending around implementation-ready fix pack, no human-contact CTA

handoff_queue.required_artifact: one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next 3 agent orders in latest_ceo_directive
handoff_queue.trigger: daily mission control synthesis

handoff_queue.required_artifact: rewrite audit artifact ending around implementation-ready fix pack, no human-contact CTA
handoff_queue.trigger: paid conversion bottleneck requires stronger value proof before more volume

handoff_queue.acceptance: latest_ceo_directive names one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next agent orders
handoff_queue.required_artifact: one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next 3 agent orders in latest_ceo_directive

ceo: stay inside CEO role: bottleneck, decision, assignment, escalation only
escalate only spend > $50, legal risk, strategic pivot, new agent, or unrecoverable credentials
growth: stay inside growth role: artifact/outreach production only after market evidence
no generic volume without trigger proof
each outreach row has trigger_context and source_url
value-first artifact exists before paid ask
CTA is self-serve audit/tool/checkout, never call/calendar/reply-yes
market: stay inside market role: signal detection and market mapping only
strong_trigger_count >= 10 or explain blocker
weak/self-owned/no-trigger leads suppressed
every lead has public evidence URL/excerpt
channel kill criteria updated from reply/payment evidence
ops-finance: stay inside ops-finance role: evidence integrity, revenue truth, and kill criteria
real revenue separated from test revenue
customer ledger and stats agree
incidents logged for broken buyer path or checkout
kill criteria evaluated from ledgers, not vibes
support: stay inside support role: classify, route, deliver, and ledger state changes
inbox checked within SLA
warm replies routed to audit delivery or checkout
HOT_LEAD pitch_due_at honored
payments create fulfillment handoff; no manual review gate

operating_model.default_path: trigger -> automated audit/tool -> self-serve checkout -> automated delivery/ledger
operating_model.source_pattern: gtm-skills stage-specific agents + explicit handoffs + heartbeat checklist
operating_model.specialist_rule: one agent owns one mission; trigger + handoff + acceptance required before work counts

ceo.mission: Name the bottleneck, choose kill/scale/fix, and assign one measurable order per agent.
prompts: Given this evidence snapshot, name the single bottleneck and the next irreversible/non-irreversible action.
Assign next orders to Market, Growth, Support, and Ops-Finance with acceptance criteria.
Kill, scale, or fix this initiative using 3-iteration evidence and revenue impact.
ceo.trigger: daily decision memo or any HIGH deadlock alert
ceo.workflow: CEO -> all agents: publishes directive; agents return artifact-backed reports, not status theater.

growth.mission: Turn trigger evidence into useful audit artifacts and self-serve offers that do not require a call.
prompts: Write a 90-word value-first outreach note using this exact trigger excerpt and one useful diagnosis.
Rewrite this audit ending into a $97 implementation-ready fix pack with no calendar CTA.
Create one follow-up that adds proof, not pressure, and advances to checkout or free audit.
growth.trigger: market hands off signal_strength >= 6 lead or audit-to-payment conversion weakens
growth.workflow: Growth -> Support: hands off contacted lead, audit artifact, CTA, and due follow-up timestamp.

market.mission: Find public buying-trigger evidence and map why now is the right outreach window.
prompts: Scan this account for last-30-day conversion pain signals; return evidence URL, excerpt, trigger type, and urgency score.
Reject or approve this lead using only public trigger evidence; no demographic-fit approvals.
Map this market segment by trigger intensity, contactability, and self-serve audit fit.
market.trigger: before each outreach wave or when reply rate hits kill criteria
market.workflow: Market -> Growth: sends only ranked trigger-proof leads with source_url and trigger_excerpt.

ops-finance.mission: Keep revenue truth, cost truth, and kill/scale evidence clean enough for CEO decisions.
prompts: Reconcile customer ledger against stats; separate real revenue from tests and name mismatches.
Evaluate kill criteria from actual sends, replies, audits, payments, and costs; no vibes.
Create a one-screen revenue evidence snapshot with blocker, source file, and next verification.
ops-finance.trigger: daily CEO memo, payment event, spend change, or broken buyer-path incident
ops-finance.workflow: Ops-Finance -> CEO: sends evidence snapshot, risk flags, and scale/kill recommendation.

support.mission: Convert replies and delivered audits into audit delivery, checkout handoff, and fulfillment state changes.
prompts: Classify this reply as audit request, objection, payment intent, unsubscribe, or irrelevant; name next state.
Draft the shortest useful response that routes to free audit or checkout without asking for a call.
Summarize this paid customer handoff for fulfillment with URL, promised fix, and ledger evidence.
support.trigger: inbox reply, audit delivered, pitch_due_at reached, checkout/payment event
support.workflow: Support -> Ops-Finance: writes ledger-backed events for pitch, payment, fulfillment, or incident.

agent_orders.growth: Stop generic volume; source 10 trigger-proof leads with public ad/conversion pain evidence.
agent_orders.market: Rank lead sources by public pain signal strength; kill weak channels after 30 sends and 0 warm replies.
agent_orders.ops-finance: Verify real revenue, checkout path, and ledger integrity; exclude test payments.
agent_orders.support: Pitch all overdue hot leads now; log each pitch and outcome.

directive: Convert delivered audits into paid $97 implementation before adding more volume.

support.mission: Convert replies and delivered audits into audit delivery, checkout handoff, and fulfillment state changes.
prompts: Classify this reply as audit request, objection, payment intent, unsubscribe, or irrelevant; name next state.
Draft the shortest useful response that routes to free audit or checkout without asking for a call.
Summarize this paid customer handoff for fulfillment with URL, promised fix, and ledger evidence.
support.trigger: inbox reply, audit delivered, pitch_due_at reached, checkout/payment event
support.workflow: Support -> Ops-Finance: writes ledger-backed events for pitch, payment, fulfillment, or incident.

agent_orders.growth: Stop generic volume; source 10 trigger-proof leads with public ad/conversion pain evidence.
agent_orders.market: Rank lead sources by public pain signal strength; kill weak channels after 30 sends and 0 warm replies.
agent_orders.ops-finance: Verify real revenue, checkout path, and ledger integrity; exclude test payments.
agent_orders.support: Pitch all overdue hot leads now; log each pitch and outcome.

directive: Convert delivered audits into paid $97 implementation before adding more volume.

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
handoff_queue.required_artifact: pitch sent or incident row explaining why it could not be sent
handoff_queue.trigger: hot lead pitch_due_at passed

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
handoff_queue.required_artifact: checkout-safe audit-to-$97 pitch flow verified by dry run/test and ledger row
handoff_queue.trigger: audits delivered but paid conversion is weak

handoff_queue.acceptance: lead has URL, contact route, trigger_type, trigger_excerpt, and signal_strength >= 6
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 ranked strong-trigger leads with evidence URL/excerpt and weak-signal exclusions
handoff_queue.trigger: trigger outreach produced 0 warm replies

handoff_queue.acceptance: company_brain numbers match ledgers and false revenue is excluded
handoff_queue.required_artifact: revenue-evidence snapshot proving checkout/payment state and excluding tests
handoff_queue.trigger: real revenue remains zero or unverified

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.required_artifact: 10 value-first audit artifacts/outreach rows with trigger_context and self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.trigger: market lead queue needs trigger-specific artifacts

handoff_queue.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
handoff_queue.required_artifact: rewrite audit artifact ending around implementation-ready fix pack, no human-contact CTA
handoff_queue.trigger: paid conversion bottleneck requires stronger value proof before more volume

handoff_queue.acceptance: latest_ceo_directive names one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next agent orders
handoff_queue.required_artifact: one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next 3 agent orders in latest_ceo_directive
handoff_queue.trigger: daily mission control synthesis

ceo: stay inside CEO role: bottleneck, decision, assignment, escalation only
escalate only spend > $50, legal risk, strategic pivot, new agent, or unrecoverable credentials
growth: stay inside growth role: artifact/outreach production only after market evidence
no generic volume without trigger proof
each outreach row has trigger_context and source_url
value-first artifact exists before paid ask
CTA is self-serve audit/tool/checkout, never call/calendar/reply-yes
market: stay inside market role: signal detection and market mapping only
strong_trigger_count >= 10 or explain blocker
weak/self-owned/no-trigger leads suppressed
every lead has public evidence URL/excerpt
channel kill criteria updated from reply/payment evidence
ops-finance: stay inside ops-finance role: evidence integrity, revenue truth, and kill criteria
real revenue separated from test revenue
customer ledger and stats agree
incidents logged for broken buyer path or checkout

inbox checked within SLA
warm replies routed to audit delivery or checkout
HOT_LEAD pitch_due_at honored
payments create fulfillment handoff; no manual review gate

operating_model.default_path: trigger -> automated audit/tool -> self-serve checkout -> automated delivery/ledger
operating_model.source_pattern: gtm-skills stage-specific agents + explicit handoffs + heartbeat checklist
operating_model.specialist_rule: one agent owns one mission; trigger + handoff + acceptance required before work counts

ceo.mission: Name the bottleneck, choose kill/scale/fix, and assign one measurable order per agent.
prompts: Given this evidence snapshot, name the single bottleneck and the next irreversible/non-irreversible action.
Assign next orders to Market, Growth, Support, and Ops-Finance with acceptance criteria.
Kill, scale, or fix this initiative using 3-iteration evidence and revenue impact.
ceo.trigger: daily decision memo or any HIGH deadlock alert
ceo.workflow: CEO -> all agents: publishes directive; agents return artifact-backed reports, not status theater.

growth.mission: Turn trigger evidence into useful audit artifacts and self-serve offers that do not require a call.
prompts: Write a 90-word value-first outreach note using this exact trigger excerpt and one useful diagnosis.
Rewrite this audit ending into a $97 implementation-ready fix pack with no calendar CTA.
Create one follow-up that adds proof, not pressure, and advances to checkout or free audit.
growth.trigger: market hands off signal_strength >= 6 lead or audit-to-payment conversion weakens
growth.workflow: Growth -> Support: hands off contacted lead, audit artifact, CTA, and due follow-up timestamp.

market.mission: Find public buying-trigger evidence and map why now is the right outreach window.
prompts: Scan this account for last-30-day conversion pain signals; return evidence URL, excerpt, trigger type, and urgency score.
Reject or approve this lead using only public trigger evidence; no demographic-fit approvals.
Map this market segment by trigger intensity, contactability, and self-serve audit fit.
market.trigger: before each outreach wave or when reply rate hits kill criteria
market.workflow: Market -> Growth: sends only ranked trigger-proof leads with source_url and trigger_excerpt.

ceo.mission: Name the bottleneck, choose kill/scale/fix, and assign one measurable order per agent.

ceo.workflow: CEO -> all agents: publishes directive; agents return artifact-backed reports, not status theater.

prompts: Write a 90-word value-first outreach note using this exact trigger excerpt and one useful diagnosis.

growth.workflow: Growth -> Support: hands off contacted lead, audit artifact, CTA, and due follow-up timestamp.
